question: In daily usage, how to open and close the hood of the jetski?
content:
1. To open the hood, push the hood latch down, then lift the hood up.<PIC>
2. To close the hood, push the hood down until it locks in place.<PIC>
3. Before operating the watercraft, make sure the hood is properly secured.
ret: "1. To open the hood, push the hood latch down, then lift the hood up.<PIC>\n2. To close the hood, push the hood down until it locks in place.<PIC>\n3. Before operating the watercraft, make sure the hood is properly secured.",["Manual20_38", "Manual20_39"]
notes: Direct hood operation section. Images show the latch used for opening and the downward closing action. PIC count is 2 and images count is 2.
